zh.Winestead, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾文斯亞德
zh.Kirkby Knowle, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾吉可比 華阿費
zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Lascelles於1278年出生在英國越可爾瑟斯克時，她的父親Roger de Lascelles47歲，母親Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke51歲。她於1290年與William Hilton在英國越可爾斯文結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1324年在英國波藍德斯卡雷比享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Lascelles于1278年出生在英国越可爾瑟斯克时，她的父亲Roger de Lascelles47岁，母亲Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke51岁。她于1290年与William Hilton在英国越可爾斯文结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1324年在英国波藍德斯卡雷比享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lascelles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one of the large number of places in northern France called Celle, Celles, Lacelle, Leschelle, or Lachelle, all from French celle ‘hermitage’, and at different times occurring both with and without the plural -s.
Variant of   Lacelle   1, a surname of French origin.

variants.name: Laswell
meanings: English: possibly an altered form of   Lascelles  . This surname is also found as   Lacefield  .

variants.name: Lacelle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Andre, Aurele, Benoit, Cecile, Marcel, Marie Paule.
Altered form of French Laselle: habitational name from La Selle, the name of several places in various parts of France. The surname Laselle is very rare in France, found in Marne. Compare Lascelles .

In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Lacelle in Corrèze or numerous minor places called La Celle, all named for a monastic cell or hermitage in their vicinity, from French celle ‘hermitage’.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Lascelles was born in 1278, in Thirsk, Yorkshire, England, her father, Roger de Lascelles, was 47 and her mother, Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke, was 51. She married William Hilton in 1290, in Swine, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1324, in Scaleby, Cumberland, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Lascelles est née en 1278, à Thirsk, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Lascelles, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke, avait 51 ans. Elle a épousé William Hilton en 1290, à Swine, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1324, à Scaleby, Cumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Lascelles 1278 in Thirsk, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Lascelles 47 und ihre Mutter Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke 51. Sie hat 1290 in Swine, Yorkshire, England William Hilton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1324 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Scaleby, Cumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Lascelles è nata il nel 1278 nel Thirsk, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Roger de Lascelles, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke, aveva 51 anni. Lei sposato William Hilton nel 1290, nel Swine, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1324, nel Scaleby, Cumberland, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Lascellesが1278年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスイルスクで生まれた時，父Roger de Lascellesは47歳，母Isabel FitzThomas Greystokeは51歳であった。1290年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスウィンでWilliam Hiltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1324年にイギリスクウンバーランドスケイレビーで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Lascelles(이)가 1278년 영국 요르크실르 스이르스크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Lascelles(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke(은)는 51세였다. 그녀는 1290년 영국 요르크실르 스윈에서 William Hilton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1324년 영국 c벌랜드 스알비에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Lascelles nasceu em 1278, em Thirsk, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Lascelles, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke, tinha 51 anos. Ela casou-se com William Hilton em 1290, em Swine, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1324, em Scaleby, Cumberland, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Lascelles родилась в 1278 г. в местности тирск, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger de Lascelles было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke, 51. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Hilton в 1290 г. в местности сваин, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1324 г. в местности скеилеби, кумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud Lascelles nació en 1278, en Thirsk, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Lascelles, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke, tenía 51 años. Se casó con William Hilton en 1290, en Swine, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1324, en Scaleby, Cumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
